sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116106" key="w)kudi/daktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠκυ-δίδακτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n116106.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quickiy taught,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἰωνός</foreign> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1589.tlg001:9:562" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.562</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
